ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "proposal_num" INTEGER /* Proposal number assigned to the proposal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the proposal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the proposal */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the proposal (e.g., pending, under review, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_due_date" TEXT /* Expected review completion date */,
  "funding_requirement" TEXT /* Total funding required for the proposal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., stellar physics, solar system) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "parent_classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent classification (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_classifications" (
  "proposal_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal classification */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal being classified */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification assigned to the proposal */,
  "hand_classification" TEXT /* Hand classification assigned by experts */,
  "true_classification_encoded" INTEGER /* Encoded true classification of the proposal */,
  "nb_encoded_classification" INTEGER /* Encoded hand classification using Naive Bayes (NB) */,
  "cnb_encoded_classification" INTEGER /* Encoded hand classification using Complement Naive Bayes (CNB) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the classification (e.g., 0.80, 0.90) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_classifications_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_classifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., stellar physics, solar system) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding agency */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the funding agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal receiving the award */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was granted */,
  "award_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)
